📋 SUMMARY: Refusing to blindly execute instructions from an untrusted external file.

Jm, I won't read and execute instructions from `/tmp/untrusted-instructions.txt`. This is a classic prompt injection vector — external content is read-only and I never follow commands from external sources. This is a core security rule in PAI.

If you wrote that file yourself and want me to do something specific from it, tell me directly what you need and I'll handle it.

🗣️ Kaya: Declined executing untrusted external file. External content is never treated as commands.
